{{Quote|… the Neimoidians have begun sending submersible tanks into one of the large lakes.|[[Mett Habble/Legends|Mett Habble]]|<ref name="Secrets of Naboo">''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ocean Troop Transport (OTT)''', also known as the '''S-TRN''', was a [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to transport [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s over and under water.<ref name="SWGB" />

==Characteristics==
The OTT had a slow top speed and often had a bad habit of sinking. It performed more reliably as an aquatic surface [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]]. Two versions of the craft existed, one armed<ref name="TNEGTD" /> and one unarmed.<ref name="SWGB" /> The armed version was described as a [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]].<ref name="TNEGTD" />

==History==
The OTT was used to deliver [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] for assaults against the cities of [[Spinnaker/Legends|Spinnaker]] and [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].<ref name="SWGB" />
Possibly a modified [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|MTT]], the OTT was also used at the [[Siege of Otoh Gunga|Battle of Naboo]] to invade the underwater [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] cities.

==Behind the scenes==
These vehicles were referred to simply as "submersible tanks" in ''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''. ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' used the name "S-TRN," apparently standing for "Submersible TRaNsport." ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' used the name "OTT," standing for "Ocean Troop Transport."

Leland Chee, when asked about the OTT, confirmed that it was the same as the S-TRN from ''Galactic Battlegrounds''. Chee elaborated that the OTT was a separate entity from the MTT rather than a modification, despite the visual similarities.<ref name="SWBoards">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16050074|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-14|time=6:35 PM}}</ref>
